name: Gingerbread Land: The Biggest Little Holiday Competition
original_name: Gingerbread Land: The Biggest Little Holiday Competition
overview: Top bakers compete in gingerbread building challenges, creating edible miniature worlds with lights, motion, and intricate details. Teams face weekly tests of design, structure, and creativity in this festive holiday competition.

trailers.title: Gingerbread Land: The Biggest Little Holiday Competition - Trailer | Magnolia Network
